query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk classes to identify high risk code

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by high risk class and intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
